attributes.title: Exercises — HTTP & Postgres logs
attributes.description: HTTP requests, Postgres SQL CRUD, and handler correlation (mirrors Grafana exercises-requests-logs)
attributes.panelsJSON:
[{"version":"8.15.5","type":"markdown","gridData":{"x":0,"y":0,"w":48,"h":7,"i":"0"},"panelIndex":"0","embeddableConfig":{"attributes":{"title":"HTTP ↔ SQL","markdown":"### Correlate HTTP requests with Postgres SQL

1. **PostgreSQL — SQL CRUD by origin** (top right): `application_name` is parsed into **correlation.origin** and **correlation.request_id**.
2. **Click correlation.request_id** (link) to open **HTTP — handler logs** filtered to that request.
3. Add **service** or **correlation.origin** in the filter bar to narrow further.
4. For the full click-through layout, use Grafana **Exercises HTTP requests & SQL logs** on port **3000**.

**Trace:** apps log `request_id` on HTTP lines; DB pools stamp `exercises-<app>;req=<id>` on Postgres `application_name`."}},"title":"How to correlate"},{"version":"8.15.5","type":"search","gridData":{"x":0,"y":7,"w":24,"h":16,"i":"1"},"panelIndex":"1","embeddableConfig":{},"panelRefName":"panel_1"},{"version":"8.15.5","type":"search","gridData":{"x":24,"y":7,"w":24,"h":16,"i":"2"},"panelIndex":"2","embeddableConfig":{},"panelRefName":"panel_2"},{"version":"8.15.5","type":"search","gridData":{"x":0,"y":23,"w":24,"h":16,"i":"3"},"panelIndex":"3","embeddableConfig":{},"panelRefName":"panel_3"},{"version":"8.15.5","type":"search","gridData":{"x":24,"y":23,"w":24,"h":16,"i":"4"},"panelIndex":"4","embeddableConfig":{},"panelRefName":"panel_4"}]
